text_original: The Dao in its regular course does nothing (for the sake of doing it), and so there is nothing which it does not do.
text_normalized: The Dao in its regular course does nothing (for the sake of doing it), and so there is nothing which it does not do.

text_original: If princes and kings were able to maintain it, all things would of themselves be transformed by them.
text_normalized: If princes and kings were able to maintain it, all things would of themselves be transformed by them.

text_original: If this transformation became to me an object of desire, I would express the desire by the nameless simplicity.
text_normalized: If this transformation became to me an object of desire, I would express the desire by the nameless simplicity.

text_original: Is free from all external aim.
text_normalized: Is free from all external aim.

text_original: With no desire, at rest and still,
text_normalized: With no desire, at rest and still,

text_original: All things go right as of their will.
text_normalized: All things go right as of their will.
